name: Modern Masters 2015

draft.notes: 15-card pack plus an additional ad card (placed at the beginning, reversed so the ad side shows). Every pack contains a foil card. Pack order: ad card, 10 commons, 3 uncommons, 1 rare, 1 foil. Foil slot likely: common 5/7, uncommon 3/14, rare/mythic 1/14; mythic rate probably 1/8 (separate rare/mythic sheets).

statedRates: foil slot likely: common 5/7, uncommon 3/14, rare/mythic 1/14; mythic ~1/8 within rare slot
sourceNotes: Masters reprint set. Large set, normal size for its era. Every pack guarantees a foil. English printing used recyclable paperboard packaging (collation unchanged). Marketing cards have token/emblem/tip card on front face. Printed in USA. 24 packs per box.
